title: Authenticated UAT is blocked by an invalid session
evidence: All 45/45 audited routes landed on /login; auth refresh returned 401 or 429.
recommendation: Provision a fresh safe UAT session outside the repository and rerun the authenticated audit.

title: Page-level UAT content not reached
evidence: The browser rendered the login shell, so Artifacts/RAG/Designer content was not exercised.
recommendation: Rerun after session renewal before judging layout or functionality.
